description: Fixed H=2/H=3 test. Sensors are ONLY aqara/zigbee (forces aqara hub) and plugs are ONLY tuya/zigbee (forces tuya hub). All solutions use H>=2, E=3. Lamps have options across yandex-wifi, yandex-zigbee, aqara-zigbee, tuya-wifi. Expected Pareto: (E=3 H=2 Q~0.938) = aqara ultra lamp + aqara sensor ultra + tuya plug ultra + 2 hubs; (E=3 H=3 Q~0.942) = yandex-zigbee-ultra lamp + aqara sensor ultra + tuya plug ultra + 3 hubs. Also lower-Q H=2 solutions on front. BF ~1s.
